pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-T-004 (DQ, Task) maps to Geospatial Data Analyst scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4340 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: ddat=0.434, nice=0.405, dcwf=0.405. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within geospatial data analysis, GIS, and location intelligence.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4340 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. Analytics-domain text signals confirmed. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA DQ-T-004 (DQ, composite 0.4340) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with DCAT-AP, DAMA DMBOK data quality competency framework; DQ awareness is a documented expectation in senior IC analyst roles. Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.4340 with signal across ddat=0.434, nice=0.405, dcwf=0.405 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from DQ-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Geospatial Data Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4340, domain DQ, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
